## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential newsletter strategy for Metronome, leveraging growthx.ai's expertise from their work with Augment Code.](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai's newsletter approach for Augment Code yielded impressive results (40% open rate, 10% CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Metronome team needs to clarify strategic direction: standalone thought leadership vs. Metronome content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [HubSpot integration crucial for Metronome's lifecycle tracking; growthx.ai to investigate compatibility](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Subscription model available to buy newsletter subscribers at market rates](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Newsletter Success with Augment Code

  - [Built from scratch for 20k product users (previously un-emailed list)](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Structure: Deep dive, news breakdown, trending content, CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [First send: 40% open rate, 10% click-through rate (CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Managed via Beehive platform with good analytics/reporting](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Iterative process for optimization week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Strategic Considerations for Metronome

  - [Options: Standalone thought leadership vs. Metronome content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Maddy leans towards leveraging existing Metronome content/blog](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [CK's input needed on using purchased domains vs. Metronome-branded newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Potential to do both: newsletter + simple web archive via Beehive](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

### HubSpot Integration and Lifecycle Tracking

  - [Critical for Metronome's nurture strategy and lead scoring](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Current setup: Web and email tracking through HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Desired: Newsletter engagement data (opens, clicks) in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [growthx.ai to investigate Beehive-HubSpot compatibility with their support team](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Subscription Growth Model

  - [Option to run campaigns to purchase subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Market rates apply for subscriber acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [growthx.ai actively implementing this strategy for Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to investigate and report on Beehive-HubSpot integration capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Metronome team to internally discuss strategic direction (standalone vs. Metronome-branded)](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [George to prepare work breakdown and scope for CK/Marcel meeting (Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled after internal Metronome alignment](https://fathom.video/share/175d-3cG7zGbMPFXJAz9i1x5sFAQiY3E?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
